label: p9_d18_full_attention_split_k_gqa_gate_decode
hardware: local RX 7900 XTX / gfx1100 24 GiB card; W7900 rerun unverified
change: Route qwen35moe resident decode-repack rows=1 full-attention through the existing split-K grouped-GQA context kernel plus BF16 gated reducer, replacing the monolithic paged context kernel followed by a separate gate-multiply launch. The unfused context+gate path remains the fallback when HIPENGINE_GGUF_DECODE_REPACK is disabled or the model is not MoE.

correctness.command: HIPENGINE_GGUF_DECODE_REPACK=1 HIPENGINE_GGUF_GEMV_DECODE=1 HIPENGINE_GGUF_WMMA_PREFILL=1 HIPENGINE_COMPILER_VERSION_FILE=/tmp/hipengine-hipcc-version.txt PYTHONPATH=. python3 scripts/qwen35_gguf_p9_e2e_correctness.py --fixture tests/fixtures/gguf/qwen36_35b_a3b_q4km_p9_e2e.json --compiler-version-file /tmp/hipengine-hipcc-version.txt --require-cached-build --json /tmp/p9_d18_splitk_gqa_gate_e2e.json

benchmark.command: HIPENGINE_GGUF_DECODE_REPACK=1 HIPENGINE_GGUF_GEMV_DECODE=1 HIPENGINE_GGUF_WMMA_PREFILL=1 HIPENGINE_COMPILER_VERSION_FILE=/tmp/hipengine-hipcc-version.txt PYTHONPATH=. python3 scripts/qwen35_gguf_bench.py --model /models/gguf/Qwen3.6-35B-A3B-UD-Q4_K_M.gguf --quant gguf_q4_k_m --prompt-length 512 --decode-tokens 128 --warmup-decode-tokens 1 --warmup-runs 1 --measured-runs 3 --force-bulk-prefill --bulk-prefill-attention-mode bulk --graph-replay-decode --graph-steps-per-replay 1 --compiler-version-file /tmp/hipengine-hipcc-version.txt --require-cached-build --json /tmp/p9_d18_splitk_gqa_gate_512x128_bench.json

rocprof_decode_512x16_diagnostic.command: rm -rf /tmp/p9_d18_splitk_gqa_gate_512x16_rocprof_csv2 && HIPENGINE_GGUF_DECODE_REPACK=1 HIPENGINE_GGUF_GEMV_DECODE=1 HIPENGINE_GGUF_WMMA_PREFILL=1 HIPENGINE_COMPILER_VERSION_FILE=/tmp/hipengine-hipcc-version.txt PYTHONPATH=. rocprofv3 --kernel-trace -d /tmp/p9_d18_splitk_gqa_gate_512x16_rocprof_csv2 -f csv -- python3 scripts/qwen35_gguf_bench.py --model /models/gguf/Qwen3.6-35B-A3B-UD-Q4_K_M.gguf --quant gguf_q4_k_m --prompt-length 512 --decode-tokens 16 --warmup-decode-tokens 1 --warmup-runs 0 --measured-runs 1 --force-bulk-prefill --bulk-prefill-attention-mode bulk --graph-replay-decode --graph-steps-per-replay 1 --compiler-version-file /tmp/hipengine-hipcc-version.txt --require-cached-build --json /tmp/p9_d18_splitk_gqa_gate_512x16_rocprof_bench2.json

delta_vs_task16_current.baseline_label: task #16/#27 current decode baseline carried into P9.B7

decision: Retain. The split-K grouped-GQA gated attention route lifts qwen35moe GGUF decode-repack graph replay above the P9.B7 95 tok/s target, keeps P9.E2 accepted, and leaves legacy prefill_out absent from the stripped 512/16 decode trace.
